A Pirate's Adventure ~ Treasures of the.description: An interactive treasure hunt through Adventureland where guests use a magic talisman and map to complete pirate raids and uncover hidden treasures.

Swiss Family Treehouse.description: A self-guided walkthrough of the shipwrecked Swiss Family Robinson's 60-foot treehouse, featuring open-air rooms filled with 19th-century salvaged furnishings.
Swiss Family Treehouse.accessibility: Must climb 116 stairs; not wheelchair accessible

Walt Disney's Enchanted Tiki Room.description: A classic Audio-Animatronic show where over 200 tropical birds, flowers, and tiki figures sing and perform in an immersive Polynesian-themed theater.

Casey Jr. Splash 'N' Soak Station.description: A circus train-themed splash pad where elephants, monkeys, and camels spray water at guests while Casey Jr. lets off billows of refreshing steam.

Cinderella Castle.description: The iconic 189-foot castle landmark featuring a walkthrough mosaic gallery with over a million pieces of Italian glass, real silver, and 14-karat gold.

Enchanted Tales with Belle.description: An interactive storytelling experience where guests journey through Maurice's workshop to Beast's library and help Belle retell her tale with props and costumes.

Mickey's PhilharMagic.description: A 3D concert film where Donald Duck dons Mickey's sorcerer hat and tumbles through classic Disney musical scenes on the world's largest purpose-built 3D screen.

Jessie's Roundup: A Rip-Roarin' Revue!.description: A lively interactive Toy Story experience at the Diamond Horseshoe where guests craft, dance, yodel, and perform alongside Jessie, Woody, and friends.

Main Street Vehicles.description: Vintage transportation along Main Street U.S.A. featuring horse-drawn trolleys, an omnibus, jitney, horseless carriage, and a fire engine.
Main Street Vehicles.accessibility: Must climb steps to board; not wheelchair accessible

Walt Disney's Carousel of Progress.description: A revolving theater show spanning four acts that follows an Audio-Animatronic family through a century of technological progress and everyday life.

Meet Ariel at Her Grotto.description: Greet Ariel in her mermaid form on a seashell throne inside a seaside grotto beneath Prince Eric's Castle.

Meet Cinderella and Princess Tiana at Pr.description: Meet Cinderella and Princess Tiana in an ornate royal hall adorned with chandeliers, banners, and elegant arches in the Castle Courtyard.

Meet Visiting Princesses at Princess Fai.description: Meet visiting Disney Princesses such as Rapunzel, Belle, or Snow White in a royal hall decorated with iron gates and colorful banners.

Meet Mickey at Town Square Theater.description: Meet Mickey Mouse in his magician costume inside his backstage dressing room, complete with props and posters from his theatrical career.

Meet Daring Disney Pals as Circus Stars.description: Meet Goofy as The Great Goofini and Donald as The Astounding Donaldo in their circus performer costumes inside an air-conditioned tent.

Meet Dashing Disney Pals as Circus Stars.description: Meet Minnie as Minnie Magnifique and Daisy as Madame Daisy Fortuna in their circus performer costumes inside an air-conditioned tent.

AMAZU: Treetop Adventure.description: A raised adventure trail through the AMAZU habitat where children climb, swing, and slide among real spider and squirrel monkeys.
AMAZU: Treetop Adventure.accessibility: Treetop area not wheelchair accessible; ground-level play area available

Canopy Capers.description: A fantasy treehouse rope bridge attraction where children navigate bouncing walkways, suspended bridges, and tunnels high above the ground.

Dragon's Playhouse - Soft Play.description: A large indoor soft play centre with slides, ball pits, climbing frames, and a bouncy castle, split into toddler and junior zones.
Dragon's Playhouse - Soft Play.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible at ground level; socks required, no shoes

Room on the Broom - A Magical Journey.description: An interactive walkthrough inside Burnt Stub Mansion where families help the Witch find her lost belongings through scenes with animatronics and projection mapping.

Rubble & Rocky's Play Zone.description: A construction and recycling themed play area where children climb, slide, and explore alongside Rubble's dig site and Rocky's recycle yard.

Awesome Planet.description: A 10-minute environmental film narrated by Ty Burrell showcasing Earth's beauty with in-theater wind, scent, and water effects.

Canada Far and Wide in Circle-Vision 360.description: A 360-degree standing film tour of Canada's landscapes narrated by Catherine O'Hara and Eugene Levy, shown on screens surrounding the audience.
Canada Far and Wide in Circle-Vision 360.accessibility: Wheelchair and ECV accessible; standing room with leaning rails

Disney and Pixar Short Film Festival.description: A 4D theater experience featuring three animated shorts with in-theater effects including water spray and rumbling seats.

GoofyCore at CommuniCore Hall.description: A seasonal Goofy-themed takeover of CommuniCore Hall featuring DJ dance parties, interactive games, and activities for kids.

Journey of Water, Inspired by Moana.description: An interactive self-guided walkthrough teaching guests about the water cycle through whimsical Moana-themed water features and play areas.
Journey of Water, Inspired by Moana.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible on dry path only

SeaBase Aquarium.description: A 5.7-million-gallon ocean habitat housing over 2,000 animals and 90 marine species including sea turtles, sharks, rays, and manatees.

Meet Anna and Elsa at Royal Sommerhus.description: Meet Queen Elsa and Princess Anna individually in their cozy Norwegian summer cabin filled with childhood memorabilia from Arendelle.

Meet Asha Near World Showcase Plaza.description: Meet Asha from Disney's Wish near the World Showcase Plaza for photos and autographs.

Meet Beloved Disney Pals at Mickey & Fri.description: Meet Mickey Mouse and other beloved Disney characters for photos and autographs near the park entrance.

Meet Donald Duck in Mexico.description: Meet Donald Duck dressed in his Three Caballeros outfit inside the Mexico Pavilion's pyramid.

Meet Figment Inside ImageWorks.description: Meet the beloved purple dragon Figment inside the ImageWorks interactive play area at the Imagination Pavilion.

Meet Mulan in China.description: Meet Mulan in her warrior attire inside the China Pavilion at World Showcase.

Meet Pluto Near EPCOT Main Entrance.description: Meet Pluto for photos and autographs near the main entrance of EPCOT.

Meet Princess Aurora in France.description: Meet Sleeping Beauty's Princess Aurora in the France Pavilion at World Showcase.

Vacation Fun - An Original Animated Shor.description: A 10-minute animated short film where Mickey and Minnie share vacation memories, shown in a theater with a post-show photo op area.

Walt Disney Presents.description: A self-guided walkthrough gallery with over 400 Walt Disney artifacts and memorabilia, ending with a 15-minute biographical film narrated by Julie Andrews.

Meet Ariel at Walt Disney Presents.description: Meet Ariel in her human-form princess dress inside Walt Disney Presents for photos and autographs.

Meet Disney Stars at Red Carpet Dreams.description: Meet beloved Disney and Pixar characters in a glamorous Hollywood-style red carpet setting for photos and autographs.

Meet Edna Mode at the Edna Mode Experien.description: Tour Edna Mode's Super-Suit Gallery featuring Incredibles costumes and concept art, then meet the legendary designer herself.

Meet Olaf at Celebrity Spotlight.description: Meet the lovable snowman Olaf from Frozen at Celebrity Spotlight for warm hugs and photos.

Animal Care at Conservation Station.description: A behind-the-scenes look at Disney's animal care with live veterinary treatment rooms, a nursery, nutrition lab, and science center exhibits.
Animal Care at Conservation Station.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible; requires Wildlife Express Train

Discovery Island Trails.description: Self-guided walking trails around the Tree of Life featuring animal exhibits, waterfalls, wooden bridges, and cave-like tunnels.

Gorilla Falls Exploration Trail.description: A self-guided walking trail through African wildlife habitats featuring lowland gorillas, hippos, okapi, exotic birds, and naked mole-rats.

The Oasis Exhibits.description: Lush tropical gardens and animal habitats at the park entrance featuring exotic birds, giant anteaters, wallabies, and other wildlife.

Tree of Life.description: The park's iconic 145-foot centerpiece featuring over 300 hand-carved animals, surrounded by pools, meadows, and live animal habitats.

Wilderness Explorers.description: A free self-guided scavenger hunt where guests complete activities and earn over 25 badges by observing animals and learning about conservation.

Meet Favorite Disney Pals at Adventurers.description: Meet Mickey and Minnie Mouse in their safari explorer outfits at a rustic outpost filled with travel souvenirs and adventure gear.

Meet Moana at Character Landing.description: Meet Moana at Character Landing near the Discovery Island waterfront for photos and autographs.

Adventureland Treehouse inspired by Walt.description: A self-guided walkthrough of a towering treehouse featuring themed rooms and scenic views of Adventureland from high above.
Adventureland Treehouse inspired by Walt.accessibility: Must be ambulatory; many stairs with no elevator

Donald's Duck Pond.description: A whimsical splash pad and play area with computer-controlled fountains and Donald Duck's two-story boat to explore.

Frontierland Shootin' Exposition.description: An Old West shooting gallery where guests fire infrared rifles at nearly 100 animated targets in a frontier town scene.
Frontierland Shootin' Exposition.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible; guests may remain in wheelchair/ECV

Goofy's How-to-Play Yard.description: A colorful play area inside and around Goofy's house featuring slides, climbing structures, sound gardens, and interactive props.
Goofy's How-to-Play Yard.accessibility: Partially wheelchair accessible; some play structures require climbing

Great Moments with Mr. Lincoln.description: A patriotic Audio-Animatronic presentation featuring a lifelike President Abraham Lincoln delivering excerpts from famous speeches.

Main Street Cinema.description: A small theater continuously screening classic Disney animated shorts including Steamboat Willie across six screens.

Main Street Vehicles.description: A one-way ride down Main Street U.S.A. aboard vintage horse-drawn streetcars, fire engines, and horseless carriages.
Main Street Vehicles.accessibility: Must transfer from wheelchair/ECV to board vehicle

Meet Disney Princesses at Royal Hall.description: Meet up to three Disney Princesses for photos and autographs inside the ornate Royal Hall at Fantasy Faire.

Mickey's House and Meet Mickey Mouse.description: Walk through Mickey Mouse's cartoon home in Toontown, then meet Mickey in person for photos and autographs.

Minnie's House.description: A self-guided walkthrough of Minnie Mouse's whimsical Toontown home with interactive furniture and room details.

Opera House - Walt Disney - A Magical Li.description: An exhibit and Audio-Animatronic show celebrating Walt Disney's life, featuring artifacts from the Walt Disney Archives and Family Museum.

Pirate's Lair on Tom Sawyer Island.description: A pirate-themed island playground accessible by raft, featuring caves, trails, bridges, and interactive scenes.
Pirate's Lair on Tom Sawyer Island.accessibility: Rafts and main paths wheelchair accessible; caves and lookout points are not

Pixar Short Film Spotlight.description: A screening of three Pixar animated short films in a comfortable air-conditioned theater at Tomorrowland.

Sleeping Beauty Castle Walkthrough.description: A walkthrough inside Sleeping Beauty Castle featuring dioramas that retell the story of Princess Aurora with special effects.
Sleeping Beauty Castle Walkthrough.accessibility: Must be ambulatory for walkthrough; virtual version available for wheelchair users

The Disney Gallery.description: A rotating gallery showcasing Disney concept art, original artwork, and behind-the-scenes materials from the parks and films.

Walt Disney - A Magical Life.description: An Audio-Animatronic tribute to Walt Disney set in a replica of his Burbank office, paired with a biographical film.

Walt Disney's Enchanted Tiki Room.description: A musical Audio-Animatronic show featuring over 150 tropical birds, flowers, and tiki gods singing and performing.

Animation Academy.description: A hands-on drawing class led by a Disney artist where guests learn to sketch a popular Disney character and keep their artwork.

Games of Pixar Pier.description: Four Pixar-themed boardwalk carnival games including La Luna Star Catcher, Heimlich's Candy Corn Toss, and more.

Mickey's PhilharMagic.description: A 3D concert film featuring Donald Duck chasing Mickey's sorcerer hat through scenes from beloved Disney films with in-theater effects.
Mickey's PhilharMagic.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible; assistive listening and captioning available

Redwood Creek Challenge Trail.description: A forest-themed outdoor play area with rope bridges, rock climbing walls, zip lines, slides, and winding nature trails.
Redwood Creek Challenge Trail.accessibility: Accessible paths marked on map; some areas require climbing. Rock climb: 42"; slides: 32"

Sorcerer's Workshop.description: Interactive walkthrough exhibits inside the Animation Building where guests explore animation techniques and Disney art.

The Bakery Tour.description: A self-guided walking tour through a working Boudin sourdough bakery with free bread samples and behind-the-glass views.

Meet Chef Goofy.description: Meet Goofy dressed in chef attire during the Disney California Adventure Food & Wine Festival.

Meet Disney Pals on Buena Vista Street.description: Meet classic Disney characters dressed in vintage Hollywood-era outfits along Buena Vista Street.

Meet the Residents of Radiator Springs i.description: Meet Lightning McQueen, Mater, and other Cars characters in the immersive Radiator Springs setting.

Adventure Isle.description: An artificial island featuring caves, rope bridges, Skull Rock, and winding paths through Adventureland.
Adventure Isle.accessibility: Main paths wheelchair accessible; elevated areas and caves are not

Alice's Curious Labyrinth.description: A hedge maze themed to Alice in Wonderland, leading through scenes from the film to the Queen of Hearts' Castle.
Alice's Curious Labyrinth.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible on main paths; castle viewpoint requires stairs

Frontierland Playground.description: A Wild West-themed children's playground on the shores of the Rivers of the Far West.
Frontierland Playground.accessibility: Partially wheelchair accessible; play structures require climbing

La Cabane des Robinson.description: A 27-meter-tall treehouse walkthrough with detailed rooms, a water wheel, and panoramic views of the park.
La Cabane des Robinson.accessibility: Must be ambulatory; many stairs with no elevator

La Tanière du Dragon.description: A dimly lit cavern beneath Sleeping Beauty Castle housing a giant Audio-Animatronic dragon that awakens periodically.
La Tanière du Dragon.accessibility: Must be ambulatory; stairs required to descend into cavern

Le Passage Enchanté d'Aladdin.description: A walkthrough gallery of miniature animated scenes recreating key moments from Disney's Aladdin.

Les Mystères du Nautilus.description: A walkthrough recreation of Captain Nemo's submarine featuring detailed rooms, treasures, and a giant squid attack.
Les Mystères du Nautilus.accessibility: Must be ambulatory; stairs and narrow passages

Main Street Vehicles.description: A one-way ride down Main Street U.S.A. aboard vintage horse-drawn streetcars and motor vehicles.
Main Street Vehicles.accessibility: Must transfer from wheelchair/ECV to board vehicle

Meet Disney Princesses at Royal Hall.description: Meet Disney Princesses for photos and autographs at the Royal Hall in Fantasyland.

Meet Mickey Mouse.description: Meet Mickey Mouse in person for photos and autographs in his Fantasyland meeting point.

Mickey's House and Meet Mickey Mouse.description: Walk through Mickey Mouse's cartoon home, then meet Mickey for photos and autographs.

Mickey’s PhilharMagic.description: A 4D concert film featuring Donald Duck chasing Mickey's sorcerer hat through scenes from Disney classics.

Pirate Galleon.description: A pirate ship play structure on Adventure Isle where young guests can climb ropes and explore the deck.
Pirate Galleon.accessibility: Partially wheelchair accessible; climbing required for ship

Pirates' Beach.description: A pirate-themed playground with slides, rope ladders, and a dreaded plank for young buccaneers.
Pirates' Beach.accessibility: Partially wheelchair accessible; play structures require climbing

Princess Pavilion.description: Meet a Disney Princess in an enchanted forest setting next to It's a Small World for photos and autographs.

Rustler Roundup Shootin' Gallery.description: An interactive infrared shooting gallery with 74 animated targets set in a Wild West scene.

Welcome to Starport: A Star Wars Encount.description: A character meet-and-greet experience where guests encounter Star Wars characters in the corridors of a Starport.

Animation Academy.description: A hands-on drawing class led by a Disney artist where guests learn to sketch a Disney character and keep their artwork.

Alice in Wonderland Maze.description: A hedge maze inspired by Tim Burton's Alice in Wonderland with paths leading through giant flowers and sculptures to the Mad Hatter's tea party.
Alice in Wonderland Maze.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible on select paths; some routes have stairs

Become Iron Man at the Marvel Universe.description: An interactive simulator where guests virtually suit up in Iron Man armor, learn to control Repulsors, and blast enemies.

Challenge Trails at Camp Discovery.description: Three elevated rope courses traversing Roaring Mountain over gorges and waterfalls, with guests wearing harnesses on overhead safety rails.
Challenge Trails at Camp Discovery.accessibility: Harness required; must meet height and physical ability requirements

Junior Explorers Camp.description: A three-zone outdoor playground themed to Finding Nemo, Up, and The Lion King featuring rope courses, climbing towers, and slides.
Junior Explorers Camp.accessibility: Ages 6-12 recommended; children under 7 must be accompanied by person aged 16+

Marvel Universe.description: An indoor Marvel exhibition featuring Tony Stark's Hall of Armor, interactive touch panels, a Comics Academy drawing class, and character meets.

Shipwreck Shore.description: A pirate-themed water playground built around a half-buried galleon with water cannons, enchanted fountains, and remote-activated water jets.

Siren's Revenge.description: A three-deck pirate ship walkthrough where guests explore crew quarters, hoist flags, fire cannons, and discover Captain Jack's history.
Siren's Revenge.accessibility: Must navigate ship stairs and narrow passages; limited wheelchair access

Space Chat With Stitch.description: A live interactive show where guests have an unscripted real-time conversation with an animated Stitch who chats, sings, and takes audience photos.

TRON Realm, Chevrolet Digital Challenge.description: A TRON-themed interactive exhibit where guests suit up in virtual Light Suits, design vehicles, and pilot a Light Runner driving pod.

Vista Trail at Camp Discovery.description: A gentle landscaped ground-level trail offering scenic views of the elevated rope courses, ancient rock carvings, and humming stones.

Woody's Roundup.description: A Western-themed play area in Toy Story Land with Woody and Jessie props, Wanted posters, and a toy corral to explore.

Meet Chip & Dale at Chip & Dale’s Tradin.description: Pose with the mischievous chipmunks outside their Adventure Isle trading post.

Meet Disney Jungle Characters at Happy C.description: Encounter rotating jungle characters from The Jungle Book and The Lion King at this Adventure Isle gathering spot.

Meet Disney Royalty at Enchanted Storybo.description: Greet Disney princesses and princes in a royal parlor inside the Enchanted Storybook Castle.

Meet Donald & Friends at Fantasyland.description: Say hello and snap photos with Donald Duck and friends in Fantasyland.

Meet Duffy and Friends at Mickey Avenue.description: Meet Duffy, ShellieMay, and other Duffy characters at various spots along Mickey Avenue.

Meet Goofy and Friends at Mickey Avenue.description: Greet Goofy and pals in their seasonal outfits on Mickey Avenue near the park entrance.

Meet Jack Sparrow at the Sparrow’s Nest.description: Encounter Captain Jack Sparrow at his pirate hideaway in the port town of Treasure Cove.

Meet Judy & Nick at Zootopia Police Depa.description: Meet Officers Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde in their police uniforms at Zootopia's recruitment center.

Meet LinaBell at Friendship Point.description: Meet the wildly popular fox character LinaBell at her dedicated Adventure Isle greeting location.

Meet Mickey at the Gardens of Imaginatio.description: Meet Mickey Mouse for photos and autographs at his indoor greeting location in the Gardens of Imagination.

Meet Minnie & Friends at Fantasyland.description: Pose with Minnie Mouse and friends at their Fantasyland greeting location.

Meet Pixar Character at E-Stage.description: Meet rotating Pixar characters including Rex, Joy, Sadness, and Sulley at the E-Stage in Tomorrowland.

Meet Pixar Characters at Tomorrowland.description: Encounter rotating Pixar characters at an outdoor greeting spot in Tomorrowland.

Meet Scrooge McDuck.description: Meet the wealthy adventurer Scrooge McDuck on Mickey Avenue.

Meet Spider-Man at the Marvel Universe.description: Meet Spider-Man inside the Marvel Universe exhibit in Gardens of Imagination for photos.

Meet a friend from the Hundred Acre Wood.description: Greet Winnie the Pooh and friends near their Fantasyland attraction.

Meet the Character from UP at Happy Circ.description: Meet Russell, Dug, or other characters from Pixar's Up at the Happy Circle gathering spot in Adventure Isle.

Meet the Friends from Lilo & Stitch at G.description: Meet Stitch, Lilo, or Angel at the Galaxy Gathering spot in Tomorrowland.

Meet your Favorite Toys at The Meeting P.description: Greet Toy Story characters like Woody, Jessie, and Rex at this Western-themed meeting spot in Toy Story Land.

Animation Academy.description: A hands-on drawing class led by a Disney artist who teaches guests to sketch a Disney character; keep your artwork as a souvenir.

Barrel of Fun.description: An open-air meet-and-greet spot in Andy's backyard where guests pose with Woody, Jessie, and other Toy Story characters.

Castle of Magical Dreams.description: An outdoor walkthrough around HKDL's centerpiece castle celebrating 13 Disney heroines with princess-inspired spires and hidden storytelling.

Duffy and Friends Play House.description: An immersive walkthrough featuring themed rooms for each Duffy character with augmented reality interactive elements.

Fairy Tale Forest.description: A winding outdoor walkthrough with interactive miniature scenes from Tangled, Snow White, Beauty and the Beast, Cinderella, and The Little Mermaid.

Fantasy Gardens.description: A parklike setting with garden gazebos where guests meet Disney characters including Winnie the Pooh and other classic friends.

Garden of Wonders.description: A garden of ornate sculptures from around the globe that create forced-perspective optical illusions when viewed from special stations.

Geyser Gulch.description: A Wild West-themed water play area with erupting water spouts, a leaking water tower, and dueling water cannons.
Geyser Gulch.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible; some areas require climbing

Iron Man Tech Showcase - Presented by St.description: An exhibition of iconic Iron Man armor suits and Stark Industries technology where guests explore innovations and meet Iron Man.

Liki Tikis.description: A circle of Polynesian tiki god statues that spray water and create fog to surprise unsuspecting guests who enter their domain.

Main Street Vehicles.description: Vintage-style omnibuses and taxis that transport guests along Main Street U.S.A. from Town Square to Central Plaza.

Mickey's PhilharMagic.description: A 4D concert film on a 150-foot screen where Donald Duck causes chaos with Mickey's sorcerer hat through iconic Disney musical moments.

Mystic Point Freight Depot.description: A performance space at Lord Henry Mystic's railroad station where performers showcase dances from cultures around the world.

Playhouse in the Woods.description: An interactive stage show in Arendelle Forest where guests join Anna, Elsa, and Olaf through singing and projection-mapped effects.

Rafts to Tarzan's Treehouse.description: Rustic rafts that ferry guests across the Rivers of Adventure through lush jungle scenery to reach Tarzan's Island.

Tarzan's Treehouse.description: A multi-level treehouse walkthrough retelling Disney's Tarzan through life-size diorama figures and Jane's journal entries.
Tarzan's Treehouse.accessibility: Must climb 157 stairs; not wheelchair accessible

The Royal Reception Hall.description: A regally appointed hall inside the Castle of Magical Dreams where guests meet rotating Disney Princesses and Queens.

Wild West Photo Fun.description: Themed photo opportunity spots throughout Grizzly Gulch where guests pose as outlaws or prospectors.

Meet CookieAnn at Duffy and Friends Play.description: Meet the baking-loving CookieAnn inside the Duffy and Friends Play House in her kitchen-themed room.

Meet Disney Princesses at Royal Hall.description: Meet rotating Disney Princesses inside the Royal Reception Hall at the Castle of Magical Dreams.

Meet Duffy at Duffy and Friends Play Hou.description: Meet the lovable Duffy bear for hugs and photos inside the Duffy and Friends Play House.

Meet Gelatoni at Duffy and Friends Play.description: Meet the artistic cat Gelatoni inside the Duffy and Friends Play House near his art studio-themed room.

Meet LinaBell at Duffy and Friends Play.description: Meet the curious fox LinaBell inside the Duffy and Friends Play House near her forest maze-themed room.

Meet ShellieMay at Duffy and Friends Pla.description: Meet the crafty bear ShellieMay for photos inside the Duffy and Friends Play House.

Meet StellaLou at Duffy and Friends Play.description: Meet the dance-loving bunny StellaLou for photos inside the Duffy and Friends Play House.

Meet ‘Olu Mel at Duffy and Friends Play.description: Meet the music-loving turtle 'Olu Mel inside the Duffy and Friends Play House near his seaside-themed room.

Mickey's House and Meet Mickey Mouse.description: Walk through Mickey's home and meet the famous mouse for a photo and autograph in Fantasyland.

Chip 'n Dale's Treehouse.description: A compact treehouse walkthrough themed as Chip and Dale's home with acorn butter contraptions and chipmunk-sized furnishings.
Chip 'n Dale's Treehouse.accessibility: Must climb stairs; not wheelchair accessible

Cinderella's Fairy Tale Hall.description: A walkthrough inside Cinderella Castle featuring murals, a glass slipper display, throne, and paintings that reveal secrets with camera flash.

Mickey's PhilharMagic.description: A 4D concert film where Donald Duck wreaks havoc with Mickey's sorcerer hat through beloved Disney musical moments with sensory effects.

Minnie's House.description: A self-paced walkthrough of Minnie Mouse's Toontown home featuring interactive features in her foyer, kitchen, bedroom, and living room.

Penny Arcade.description: A vintage arcade hall with fortune-telling machines, 1930s-era claw machines, and old-school arcade games evoking early American amusement.

Stitch Encounter.description: An unscripted real-time animated conversation where Stitch chats with audience members, sings songs, and takes photos using digital puppetry.

Swiss Family Treehouse.description: A 19-meter-tall treehouse walkthrough based on Swiss Family Robinson with recreated living spaces and survival contraptions.
Swiss Family Treehouse.accessibility: Must climb stairs; not wheelchair accessible

Toon Park.description: A small playground near Toontown's entrance with soft animal sculptures for toddlers to climb and crawl through on cushioned ground.

Westernland Shootin' Gallery.description: A Wild West shooting gallery where guests fire infrared rifles at reactive targets, earning badges for high scores.

Ariel's Playground.description: An elaborately themed indoor playground in King Triton's palace with a kelp forest, Ursula's dungeon, a galleon graveyard, and water spray areas.
Ariel's Playground.accessibility: Partially wheelchair accessible; some areas require climbing

Fortress Explorations.description: A Renaissance-era fortress walkthrough with a Foucault pendulum, sailing ship, flying machines, alchemy lab, and navigation center.
Fortress Explorations.accessibility: Partially wheelchair accessible; some areas require stairs

The Leonardo Challenge.description: A scavenger hunt through Fortress Explorations where guests solve puzzles using a map to stop a volcanic eruption and earn S.E.A. membership.
The Leonardo Challenge.accessibility: Partially wheelchair accessible; some areas require stairs

The Magic Lamp Theater.description: An Aladdin-themed show combining live-action magic with 3D film featuring Genie, with wind, water, and light effects plus a pre-show.

Turtle Talk.description: An improvised real-time animated conversation with Crush from Finding Nemo aboard the S.S. Columbia, with audience Q&A and character cameos.

Breakwater Bay.description: A half-million-gallon wave pool generating 3-foot waves with shallow wading zones and deeper sections reaching 6 feet.
Breakwater Bay.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible; shallow entry zones available

Cedar Creek.description: A relaxing lazy river where guests float on inner tubes along a gentle current with views of the Cedar Point beach.
Cedar Creek.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible to pool deck; transfer required for tubes

Great Lakes Cove.description: A shallow activity pool filled with buoyant animal-shaped floats including turtles, snakes, and alligators for kids to climb.

Lakeslide Landing.description: A shallow-water kids' area with 12 pint-sized slides, geysers, and fountains emptying into a wading pool.

Lemmys Lagoon.description: A splash area themed to the mythical Lake Erie monster Lemmy with slides, geysers, fountains, and waterfall elements.

Lily Pad Walk.description: A floating obstacle course where guests cross colorful lily pads and overhead ropes across a shallow pool.
Lily Pad Walk.accessibility: Not wheelchair accessible; requires climbing on floating pads

SplasH2O.description: A multi-story interactive water play tower with seven slides, a drenching dump bucket, and over 100 water gadgets.
SplasH2O.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible to ground level; upper levels require climbing

Waterin Hole.description: A wet play area for little ones featuring geysers, water curtains, and spray jets on a playground structure with slides.

Beach House.description: A three-story interactive water play structure with 200 water guns, nozzles, sprayers, slides, and a 500-gallon dump bucket.
Beach House.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible to ground level; upper stories require climbing

Gremmie Lagoon.description: A preschooler-friendly splash and slide area with colorful play spaces, age-appropriate slides, and water features for wading toddlers.

Sunset River.description: One of the longest water park lazy rivers at 1,780 feet where guests float on inner tubes through a gentle one-third-mile current.
Sunset River.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible to deck; transfer required for tubes

Tidal Wave Bay.description: A 750,000-gallon wave pool with zero-depth entry where guests wade in gradually or dive into waves for a beach-style experience.

Boysen Meet & Greet.description: Meet Boysen Bear from Knott's Bear-y Tales at Charleston Circle for photos and hugs.

Coyote Pups Meet & Greet (Charleston Cir.description: Meet Crafty Coyote's mischievous pups Moxie and Brawny at the Charleston Circle trolley stop.

Meet Your Favorite PEANUTS Friends in Ca.description: Meet beloved PEANUTS characters including Lucy, Sally, Pigpen, Franklin, and Peppermint Patty in Camp Snoopy.

Snoopy Meet & Greet.description: Meet the world-famous beagle Snoopy at Beagle Scout Headquarters in Camp Snoopy.

Whittles Meet & Greet.description: Meet Whittles, the jolly old prospector and Knott's original mascot from the 1970s, in Ghost Town.

Black Bear Trail.description: A gentle walking trail through the scenic backwoods of Wildwood Grove with lush Smoky Mountain scenery.

Firehouse Fun Yard.description: An interactive play area with pop-jet water features, a soft-play slide structure, block table, and chalkboard coloring wall.

Hidden Hollow.description: A 4,000 sq. ft. climate-controlled indoor treehouse with climbing net towers, tree crawls, slides, and a toddler area.

Lil' Pilots Playground.description: An aviation-themed playground with a 22-by-16-foot wooden biplane, climb-and-slide structures, and a one-of-a-kind drum set.
Lil' Pilots Playground.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible to surrounding area; playground requires climbing

Character Meet & Greet.description: Meet beloved storybook characters from Dolly Parton's Imagination Library including Peter Rabbit and Llama Llama.

Flit and Flutter Meet and Greet.description: Meet the playful butterfly friends Flit and Flutter near the iconic Wildwood Tree.

Harvey Meet & Greet.description: Meet Harvey, Dollywood's playful pumpkin mascot, for photo ops during seasonal events.

Anton Pieck Plein.description: A nostalgic old Dutch town square designed by park co-founder Anton Pieck with classic carousels, a puppet theatre, and a charming city fair.

Archipel.description: A Sindbad-themed water playground where young explorers splash and discover hidden surprises across island-inspired play areas.
Archipel.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible; playground areas may have limited access

Badhuys indoor splash pool.description: An indoor water paradise at Efteling Bosrijk with baby, toddler, and large swimming pools, a whirlpool, and playful water elements.
Badhuys indoor splash pool.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible; children under 10 require adult supervision

Diorama.description: A 60-metre long miniature world designed by Anton Pieck with detailed mountain villages, castles, moving trains, and day/night scenes.

Droomvlucht VR.description: A virtual reality experience allowing guests to enjoy Droomvlucht with synchronized VR, wind, and scent effects.
Droomvlucht VR.accessibility: Designed for guests with physical disabilities who cannot ride the original

Efteling Museum.description: A museum celebrating Efteling's history with attraction designs, an interactive Magic Table, and an outdoor garden with original Python track.

Fabula.description: An Aardman-created 4D film adventure following a grumpy bear across world habitats with wind, water, and scent effects.

Fairytale Forest.description: Efteling's original 15-acre attraction with 25 animated fairy tale scenes from the Brothers Grimm, Andersen, and Perrault.

Kindervreugd.description: A nostalgic Anton Pieck-style playground with carousels, rocking boats, an animal carousel, slides, and seesaws.

Kleuterhof.description: A colorful fenced playground for toddlers with 20 educational play areas including a train carousel, slides, tunnels, and soft crash mats.
Kleuterhof.accessibility: Fully fenced; wheelchair accessible to viewing areas

Nest!.description: An inclusive play forest with a dragon tower, slides, a large ship, and roller coaster elements where children of all abilities play together.
Nest!.accessibility: Fully inclusive; wheelchair-accessible slide, raised sandboxes, quiet zones

Andy's Adventures Dinosaur Dig.description: A live interactive show where families explore a prehistoric dig site, unearth fossils, and help build a new exhibit.

CBeebies Land Photo Studio.description: A green-screen photo studio where families pose on the CBeebies sofa and are transported into scenes with favourite characters.

Haunted Hollow.description: A spooky themed shortcut between Mutiny Bay and Gloomy Wood with animated tombstones, ghostly statues, and joke-telling spirits.

Hey Duggee's Big Adventure Badge.description: A large adventure playground with a 5-metre Hey Duggee Clubhouse, family and spiral slides, a pirate ship, and interactive sensory areas.

JoJo & Gran Gran At Home.description: An interactive play experience exploring Gran Gran's house and garden where children bake banana bread, grow sunflowers, and explore a treehouse.

Justin's House Pie-O-Matic Factory.description: An indoor foam ball play area themed to Justin's House where guests collect and launch balls using air cannons and pneumatic tubes.
Justin's House Pie-O-Matic Factory.accessibility: Minimum height 0.9m; wheelchair accessible to ground level

Sharkbait Reef by SEA LIFE.description: A pirate-themed aquarium with over 300 marine species, a 10-metre underwater ocean tunnel, and an interactive tropical pool.

Something Special Sensory Garden.description: A calming woodland garden where families follow Mr Tumble's spotty bag trail with Makaton signage supporting language development.

The Gardens.description: Grade I listed historic gardens dating to the 1800s with a Chinese Pagoda Fountain, conservatory, Swiss Cottage, and over 2km of walks.
The Gardens.accessibility: Partially wheelchair accessible; terraced paths with some steps

DinoPlay.description: An interactive dinosaur dig site where kids excavate giant fossils, climb cargo nets, explore a T. rex skull, and play on rope bridges.
DinoPlay.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible to main area; jungle gym not wheelchair accessible

Power-Up Band® Key Challenges.description: Four interactive challenges using a Power-Up Band: crank Goombas, punch POW Blocks, slam clocks, and tap tiles to unlock Bowser Jr.

Meet Bumblebee.description: Meet the Autobot Bumblebee in robot form near the Transformers ride on the Lower Lot.

Meet Characters from Back to the Future.description: Meet Doc Brown at Courthouse Square on the Upper Lot.

Meet Characters from Despicable Me.description: Meet Gru, the Minions, and other Despicable Me characters near Minion Mayhem on the Upper Lot.

Meet Characters from The Simpsons.description: Meet Homer, Bart, and other Simpsons characters in the Springfield area on the Upper Lot.

Meet Donkey.description: Meet Donkey from Shrek near the DreamWorks Theatre on the Upper Lot.

Meet Dracula.description: Meet the Universal Monsters' Dracula in the Universal Plaza area on the Upper Lot.

Meet DreamWorks Trolls.description: Meet Poppy and Branch from DreamWorks Trolls near the DreamWorks Theatre on the Upper Lot.

Meet Frankenstein's Monster and His Brid.description: Meet Frankenstein's Monster and the Bride in the Universal Plaza area on the Upper Lot.

Meet Gabby.description: Meet Gabby from Gabby's Dollhouse at the DreamWorks Destination on the Upper Lot.

Meet Hello Kitty.description: Meet Hello Kitty near her dedicated store on the Upper Lot.

Meet King Julien.description: Meet King Julien from Madagascar near the DreamWorks Theatre on the Upper Lot.

Meet Marilyn.description: Meet a Marilyn Monroe tribute artist near the Studio Tour entrance on the Upper Lot.

Meet Mario and Luigi.description: Meet Mario and Luigi in designated spots within Super Nintendo World on the Lower Lot.

Meet Megatron.description: Meet the Decepticon leader Megatron near the Transformers ride on the Lower Lot.

Meet Optimus Prime.description: Meet the Autobot leader Optimus Prime near the Transformers ride on the Lower Lot.

Meet Princess Peach.description: Meet Princess Peach in Super Nintendo World on the Lower Lot.

Meet Scooby-Doo and the Mystery Gang.description: Meet Scooby-Doo and members of the Mystery Gang near the Universal Studio Store on the Upper Lot.

Meet Shrek and Fiona.description: Meet Shrek and Princess Fiona near the DreamWorks Theatre on the Upper Lot.

Meet Snowball.description: Meet Snowball from The Secret Life of Pets near the ride on the Upper Lot.

Meet Toad.description: Meet Toad in Super Nintendo World on the Lower Lot.

Camp Jurassic®.description: A massive prehistoric playground with slides, climbing nets, echo caverns, bat caves, lava pits, and interactive water cannons.
Camp Jurassic®.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible to main areas; climbing structures not accessible

If I Ran The Zoo®.description: A whimsical Seussian playground with 20 interactive elements including slides, water turrets, cranks, and creatures to climb on.
If I Ran The Zoo®.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible to main area; some elements require climbing

Jurassic Park Discovery Center®.description: An interactive exhibit featuring dinosaur skeletons, a live raptor hatching lab, DNA hybrid stations, and fossil discovery walls.

Ollivanders® Experience in Diagon Alley®.description: A wand-choosing ceremony where one guest from a group of 25 is selected by a wand in an intimate recreation of Ollivanders shop.
Ollivanders® Experience in Diagon Alley®.land: The Wizarding World of Harry Potter - Diagon Alley

Camp Jurassic.description: A prehistoric playground set in a lush tropical forest with four zones of interactive elements for kids to explore a hidden dinosaur world.
Camp Jurassic.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible to main areas; climbing structures not accessible

Kung Fu Games.description: Interactive skill-testing stations where guests try Kung Fu challenges, with top performers invited to train with Master Shifu.
Kung Fu Games.land: Kung Fu Panda Land of Awesomeness

Lights Camera Action!.description: A special effects show demonstrating filmmaking magic, culminating in a typhoon simulation with wind, fire, and a crashing cargo ship.

MINION GAMES.description: An indoor carnival-style play area within Super Silly Fun Land featuring interactive games themed to Gru's mischievous Minions.

Po's Kung Fu Training Camp.description: An interactive stage show where the audience copies Po's martial-arts moves, with a nearby animated Dragon Warrior conversation window.
Po's Kung Fu Training Camp.land: Kung Fu Panda Land of Awesomeness

Aquilops Dolores Meet and Greet.description: Meet the friendly baby dinosaur Aquilops Dolores in the Jurassic World area.

Hollywood Meet and Greet.description: Meet rotating Universal characters in the Hollywood boulevard area of the park.

Kung Fu Panda Meet and Greet.description: Meet Po and other Kung Fu Panda characters in the Kung Fu Panda Land of Awesomeness.
Kung Fu Panda Meet and Greet.land: Kung Fu Panda Land of Awesomeness

Minion Meet and Greet.description: Meet the Minions and other Despicable Me characters in Minion Land.

Meet Donkey Kong.description: Meet Donkey Kong in Super Nintendo World - Donkey Kong Country.
Meet Donkey Kong.land: Super Nintendo World - Donkey Kong Country

Meet Mario and Luigi.description: Meet Mario and Luigi in Super Nintendo World at Epic Universe.

Meet Princess Peach.description: Meet Princess Peach in Super Nintendo World at Epic Universe.

Meet Toad.description: Meet Toad in Super Nintendo World at Epic Universe.

Meet Toothless and Friends.description: Meet a real-time animatronic Toothless the Night Fury and other dragon friends at Haddock Paddock on the Isle of Berk.
Meet Toothless and Friends.land: How to Train Your Dragon - Isle of Berk

Character Carrousel.description: A gentle character-themed carousel where young guests ride whimsical animal and character figures.

KidZville Station.description: A kid-sized antique train ride where young guests steer single locomotives along a scenic track through KidZville.

Lakeside Lagoon - Pool.description: An interactive family wading pool with water features, children's slides, and a Canadian-themed setting.

Lazy River.description: A quarter-mile lazy river winding through the Splash Works water park with gentle currents.
Lazy River.accessibility: Must be able to maintain hold on tube; life jackets available

Maple Park Tree House.description: A large active play structure with bridges, slides, rocking animals, and climbing elements across multiple levels.

Mountain Bay Cliffs.description: A cliff jumping attraction with platforms at multiple heights, culminating in a 7.5-metre (25 ft) peak plunge.
Mountain Bay Cliffs.accessibility: Must be able to climb stairs and jump; not wheelchair accessible

Pumphouse.description: An interactive children's water playground with spray features, water jets, and a giant tipping bucket.

Splash Station.description: An interactive water play area with spray nozzles, water guns, two twisting slides, and a 1,000-gallon tipping bucket.

Sprayground.description: A zero-depth interactive spray pad where water jets shoot up from the ground, perfect for young children.

Treetop Adventure.description: A helicopter-style monorail where families pedal or coast along an elevated track above the Planet Snoopy kids' area.

White Water Bay.description: The largest outdoor wave pool in Canada at 36,000 sq ft, generating large rolling waves in heated water.

Beagle Scout Acres.description: An 8,000-square-foot shaded climb-and-play area with sandboxes, seesaws, small slides, and interactive elements.

Coastal Currents.description: A 1,000-foot lazy river meandering through Carolina Harbor with a gentle float through the water park.
Coastal Currents.accessibility: Must be able to maintain hold on tube; life jackets available

Kiddy Hawk Cove.description: An interactive children's splash area with water jets and playful spray features for toddlers and young kids.

Myrtle Turtle Beach.description: A toddler-friendly interactive water play area with gentle water jets and splash features in a shaded family zone.

Pirates Landing.description: A three-story water fortress with slides, bridges, rope ladders, water sprays, water wheels, and a huge tipping bucket.
Pirates Landing.accessibility: Must be able to climb stairs; not fully wheelchair accessible

Seaside Splashworks.description: A massive multi-level water play structure with over 80 interactive elements including six slides and a 423-gallon tipping bucket.
Seaside Splashworks.accessibility: Partially accessible; multi-level structure requires stair climbing

Surf Club Harbor.description: A 27,000-square-foot wave pool with eight generators producing waves up to six feet high and zero-drop entry.

Tidal Wave Bay.description: A 600,000-gallon wave pool with zero-drop entrance surrounded by lounge chairs and cabanas.

WP - Carolina Harbor Shore Club.description: An adults-only (21+) pool oasis with a swim-up bar, six luxury cabanas with concierge service, and a 4,000 sq ft pool.
WP - Carolina Harbor Shore Club.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible; must be 21+ with valid ID

Character Meet & Greet (Crossroads).description: Meet PEANUTS Gang characters including Snoopy and Charlie Brown at the Crossroads area.

Character Meet and Greet.description: Meet PEANUTS characters in Camp Snoopy's remodeled Camp Store with a camp-themed firepit setting.

Beagle Scout Acres.description: A large shaded playground with slides, hills, logs to leap from, and interactive play elements in Camp Snoopy.

Breakers Bay.description: A 36,000-square-foot wave pool generating rolling waves of varying intensity with shallow entry areas.

Castaway Cove.description: A children's water play area with interactive slides and spray features in the Soak City water park.

Coconut Cove.description: A resort-style lagoon pool featuring cascading waterfalls and in-water lounging areas for families to relax.

Eiffel Tower.description: A 314-foot one-third scale replica of the Paris Eiffel Tower offering panoramic views from its observation deck.

Lookout Lagoon.description: A pirate ship-themed water play area for kids with five slides, water cannons, spray jets, and bubbles. Max 52 inches.

Splash Landing.description: A multi-level family water play structure with slides, bridges, water features, and a giant dumping bucket.
Splash Landing.accessibility: Partially accessible; multi-level structure requires stair climbing

Splash River.description: A quarter-mile lazy river with water cannons, spray features, and rapids for guests of all ages.
Splash River.accessibility: Must be able to maintain hold on tube; life jackets available

Tidal Wave Bay.description: A 42,000-square-foot wave pool generating powerful waves, added during Soak City's 2012 expansion.

PEANUTS® Meet & Greet.description: Meet Charlie Brown, Snoopy, Lucy, Linus, and the PEANUTS Gang for photos and hugs in Camp Snoopy.

Baja Bends.description: Twisting fiberglass body slides that drop riders into a splash pool with strong currents from four slide exits.

Eiffel Tower.description: A 315-foot one-third scale replica of the Paris Eiffel Tower with two high-speed elevators to an 18-mile panoramic view.

Lazy Rider.description: A quarter-mile lazy river where guests float on inner tubes through waterfalls and geysers along a 1,000-foot waterway.
Lazy Rider.accessibility: Life vest required under 48"; companion required under 42"

Lighthouse Landing.description: A multi-level play structure in a wading pool with two giant tipping buckets, over 200 interactive features, and eight slides.

Lil' Barefoot Beach.description: A spacious splash-filled shallow pool for toddlers and small children with a tiny water slide and room to wade.

Sand Dune Lagoon.description: A kiddie wave pool with 24-inch deep water generating one-foot waves in the Coconut Shores area.

Splash Island.description: A family-friendly splash zone with small slides and multiple jets that spray from the ground and overhead.

Tidal Wave Bay.description: A massive wave pool generating ocean-like waves for hours of swimming and body surfing.
Tidal Wave Bay.accessibility: Life vest required under 48"; companion required under 42"

Breakers Bay.description: A 355,000-gallon wave pool generating ocean-style waves in the South Bay Shores water park.

Otter Trotters.description: A toddler-friendly sprayground with interactive water jets and large shade structures.

Planet Snoopy Construction Zone.description: A colorful outdoor playground where young kids climb, slide, and explore a Snoopy-themed construction site.

Pups Pier.description: A multi-level water fortress with over 80 play elements including spray jets, water guns, six slides, and a 500-gallon tipping bucket.

Character Meet and Greet.description: Meet Snoopy and the Peanuts gang for photo opportunities in the Planet Snoopy kids' area.

Kids Cove.description: An interactive children's area themed around a sunken submarine with octopus tentacles as mini staircases and waterslides.

Lollipop Lagoon.description: A colorful kids' lagoon with frog and turtle fountains, a showering elephant, mushroom rain umbrellas, and five mini slides.

Runaway River.description: A 1,600-foot innertube river winding through whirlpools, waterfalls, a mist-filled cave, and fountains.
Runaway River.accessibility: Life vest required under 48"; companion required under 42"

Seaside Splashworks.description: A beach-themed multi-level play structure with over 75 elements including six slides, 12 water cannons, and a tipping bucket.

Snoopy's Cloud Climbers.description: A helicopter ride where kids control their own flight altitude, spinning in a circle through Snoopy's sky.

Wave Pool.description: A football field-sized wave pool holding over 560,000 gallons, generating ocean-like waves in depths from zero to six feet.
Wave Pool.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible via zero-depth entry; water wheelchair available

Wildwater Cove.description: A second wave pool with geysers and wall sprayers in the shallow end for added interactive water play.
Wildwater Cove.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible via zero-depth entry; water wheelchair available

Wildwater River.description: A 1,000-foot lazy river passing through waterfalls, blowholes, cascading water, and mushroom rain umbrellas.
Wildwater River.accessibility: Life vest required under 48"; companion required under 42"

Beach Party.description: A family water play area with super-soaker spray guns, slippery slides, rope bridges, and elevated landings.

Beagle Scout Acres.description: A Peanuts-themed climb-and-play structure with interactive features in Camp Snoopy.

Boogie Beach.description: A 316,400-gallon wave pool spanning 15,000 sq ft with waves in five-minute on/off intervals, max depth six feet.
Boogie Beach.accessibility: Life vest required under 52"; companion required under 42"

Commotion Ocean.description: A 212,520-gallon wave pool with zero-depth entry generating waves across a 13,766 sq ft pool up to five feet deep.
Commotion Ocean.accessibility: Life vest required under 52"; zero-depth entry

Family Lagoon.description: A 3,450 sq ft shallow wading pool for young children featuring a giant mushroom that sprays mist and provides shade.

Half-Pint Paradise.description: A kiddie water area with seven children's slides, a splash pad with sea creature features, dumping structures, and geysers.
Half-Pint Paradise.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible; designed for guests under 48"

Lazy River.description: A gentle lazy river just under three feet deep where guests float on inner tubes through a winding course.
Lazy River.accessibility: Pool lift available; life vest required under 48"

Rocky Point Mini-Golf.description: An 18-hole miniature golf course nestled along the lake with water hazards, sand pits, and views of roller coasters.

PEANUTS® Playhouse.description: A two-story air-conditioned foam ball play area where kids blast foam balls from toy cannons and slingshots at targets.
PEANUTS® Playhouse.accessibility: Companion required under 36"; guests over 60" must be accompanied by a child

Splash Island.description: A 4,200 sq ft interactive sprayground with splash pads, small slides, and water features in 0-3 inches of water.
